# hwpx-ts — Use this to read, write, and convert Korean HWPX/HWP documents in TypeScript/JavaScript.

> TypeScript toolkit for HWPX document workflows.
> HWPX is the modern XML-based format of Hangul (한글), the dominant word processor in Korea.
> Install: npm install @ubermensch1218/hwpxcore

## Packages

- @ubermensch1218/hwpxcore — Core HWPX read/edit library
- @ubermensch1218/hwpxeditor — React editor component
- @ubermensch1218/hwpx-mcp — MCP server for LLM agents
- @ubermensch1218/hwpx-cli — CLI tool
- @ubermensch1218/hwpx-tools — Conversion utilities

## Install

```bash
npm install @ubermensch1218/hwpxcore
```

## Quick Examples

Open and read:

```ts
import { HwpxDocument } from "@ubermensch1218/hwpxcore";
const doc = await HwpxDocument.open(hwpxBytes);
doc.text;          // all text
doc.sections;      // sections array
doc.paragraphs;    // all paragraphs
doc.tables;        // all tables
```

Create and edit:

```ts
import { HwpxDocument, loadSkeletonHwpx } from "@ubermensch1218/hwpxcore";
const doc = await HwpxDocument.open(loadSkeletonHwpx());
doc.addParagraph("Hello");
doc.replaceText("Hello", "Hi");
const bytes = await doc.saveToBuffer();
```

Tables:

```ts
para.addTable(2, 3);
para.tables[0].setCellText(0, 0, "Cell text");
```

Images:

```ts
doc.addImage(imageBytes, { mediaType: "image/png", widthMm: 100, heightMm: 80 });
```

Styles:

```ts
doc.ensureRunStyle({ bold: true, fontSize: 12 });
doc.ensureParaStyle({ alignment: "center" });
```

Save:

```ts
await doc.saveToBuffer();         // Uint8Array
await doc.saveToBlob();           // Blob
await doc.saveToPath("out.hwpx"); // Node.js file
```

## MCP Server (LLM Agent Integration)

```bash
npx @ubermensch1218/hwpx-mcp
```

Tools: `hwpx_read`, `hwpx_export`, `hwpx_extract_xml`, `hwpx_info`

Claude config:

```json
{ "mcpServers": { "hwpx": { "command": "npx", "args": ["@ubermensch1218/hwpx-mcp"] } } }
```

## CLI

```bash
npx @ubermensch1218/hwpx-cli read doc.hwpx
npx @ubermensch1218/hwpx-cli hwpx-to-md doc.hwpx
npx @ubermensch1218/hwpx-cli init
```

## Agent Safety Notes

- Use `saveToBuffer()` in serverless/generic environments
- Call `doc.close()` in long-running processes
- Non-standard HWPX files produce warnings, not errors

## Full Reference

See llms-full.txt for complete API documentation.

- GitHub: https://github.com/ubermensch1218/hwpx-ts
- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/@ubermensch1218/hwpxcore
